title: Return Line Breaks to Long Text Column
excerpt:
It seems over the weekend the decision was made to no longer allow line break formatting in the Long Text columns. I would like to get this “feature” added back in. 
For context, we use this column to show any high level…

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems over the weekend the decision was made to no longer allow line break formatting in the Long Text columns. I would like to get this “feature” added back in.

For context, we use this column to show any high level updates pertaining to the campaign. Here was the old/desired formatting.

I know past 2-3 lines it wouldn’t show anyway, but here is how the column behaves now with no changes to the text in the edit

I chatted with support this morning and it seems this change was intentional by the dev team. It honestly feels like a step backward to me.

posts.author: vietminhk14 (Viet Do)
posts.cookedHtml: I totally agree with you on this. I am using Docugent to generate a document including a longtext column for Product Description, and it looks idiot without line breaks.

posts.author: simonschilder (Simon schilder)
posts.cookedHtml: did you get an answer for this item? I have the same problem

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: Nope. Sadly I don’t think this issue is of any concern to Monday. This thread and another I was involved in about formatting long text columns have gotten no response from the team.

posts.author: p61Cook (Kaye)
posts.cookedHtml: Love to bring this back to the top of voting to turn back on. We really need it. I get you can hover over the column and it will display the hard returns. But if you have the new wrap text feature turned on - it won’t show them anymore.
